input.input:
set -e
mkdir -p /_outputs
DB_PATH="/_outputs/sql_agent_skill_test.db"
sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" <<'SQL'
CREATE TABLE customers(customer_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT);
CREATE TABLE orders(order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, customer_id INTEGER, total REAL, FOREIGN KEY(customer_id) REFERENCES customers(customer_id));
CREATE TABLE order_items(item_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, order_id INTEGER, product TEXT, unit_price REAL, quantity INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(order_id) REFERENCES orders(order_id));
INSERT INTO customers VALUES (1,'Alice Smith'),(2,'Bob Johnson'),(3,'Carol Lee');
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (101,1,120.0),(102,2,85.5),(103,1,40.0),(104,3,200.0);
INSERT INTO order_items VALUES (1,101,'Widget',20.0,3),(2,101,'Gadget',10.0,4),(3,102,'Widget',20.0,2),(4,103,'Thingamajig',5.0,8),(5,104,'Widget',20.0,5);
SQL

echo 'Table list in DB:'
sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" ".tables"

# Q1: Top 3 customers by total spent
Q1="SELECT c.name AS customer, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS total_spent
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 3;"
printf '\nQ1 Result:\n'
sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" "$Q1" -column -header

# Q2: Most popular product by total sales value
Q2="SELECT oi.product, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS total_sales
FROM order_items oi
GROUP BY oi.product
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;"
printf '\nQ2 Result:\n'
sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" "$Q2" -column -header

output:
Table list in DB:
customers  orders  order_items

Q1 Result:
customer      total_spent
Alice Smith   140.0
Carol Lee     100.0
Bob Johnson   40.0

Q2 Result:
product     total_sales
Widget      200.0
